name: supabase_rw
description: Leer, crear o actualizar datos en Supabase. Prohibido borrar. Métodos permitidos: GET (leer), POST (crear), PATCH (actualizar).

config.command: if [ "{{method}}" = "DELETE" ]; then echo 'Error: DELETE no está permitido'; exit 1; fi; curl -s -X {{method}} "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/{{table}}?{{params}}" -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{{body}}'
